name: False Fish
recipeInstructions:
False fish has no more to do with fish than Mock Goose does with goose, but it is a wonderfully inventive dish that resembles fried fish steaks.
1. Boil the rice until cooked - about 20 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, cook the lentils, garlic, and onion together in as little water as possible.
3. As soon as the rice and lentils are just cooked, drain them, then stir them together adding the herbs and salt.
4. Press the mixture into a 2 pint (1.2 litre) pudding basin.
5. Fit a saucer into the basin on top of the mixture, weight it down with a couple of tins, and leave overnight.
6. The following day, remove the mixture and cut into slices.
7. Coat the slices with egg, then breadcrumbs, and fry until golden.
8. Serve with fresh vegetables and parsley sauce.
